mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mission_logs (id, mission_assignment_id, from_status, to_status, changed_by, comment, created_at) VALUES ( gen_random_uuid(), #{missionAssignmentId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{fromStatus, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.MissionStatusTypeHandler}, #{toStatus, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.MissionStatusTypeHandler}, #{changedBy, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{comment}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, mission_assignment_id, from_status, to_status, changed_by, comment, created_at FROM mission_logs WHERE mission_assignment_id = #{missionAssignmentId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at DESC
